title: argemone intermedia var. stenopetala
intro: Argemone intermedia var. stenopetala, also known as the desert prickly poppy or Mexican prickly poppy, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can be used to treat wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Argemone intermedia var. stenopetala include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as providing relief from fever and colds. The plant can be prepared as a topical cream or salve, or used in herbal tea infusions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
